response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive software development experience but lacks the core C++/Windows platform expertise and capital markets domain knowledge required for the role. His background is heavily skewed toward web/mobile development, scripting, and languages like JavaScript, TypeScript, D, and Node.js, with minimal evidence of professional C++ development on Windows systems or SQL Server/Oracle experience. While he demonstrates strong technical skills and contributions to open-source projects, these do not align with the mandatory or domain-specific requirements of the job.
strengths: Strong foundational software development skills across multiple languages and platforms
Experience with SQL and database management (MongoDB, MySQL)
Contributions to open-source projects and technical workshops
concerns: No clear evidence of 5–10 years of professional C++ development on Windows platform
No domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking
Minimal exposure to SQL Server/Oracle and no mention of Summit platform or messaging frameworks
